                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap
Manager: Anmol Sawhney

On Mon, 1 Sept 2025 at 17:57, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

There are a total of three planned fixes, out of which two have already been deployed — one for sending error statuses accurately and the other addressing the bottleneck issue.

We are currently working on the third fix, which involves implementing a retry mechanism to handle messages stuck in Unknown status. Please note that this third fix will not affect your current workflow.

Additionally, the Clevertap report issue has been fixed.

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

            Gallabox Support 
  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

                                    Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap
Manager: Anmol Sawhney 
Manager's email: anmol.sawhney@clevertap.com

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap
Manager: Anmol Sawhney 
Manager's email: anmol.sawhney@clevertap.com

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

            Gallabox Support 
  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,

                                    Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

Best Regards,

  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

                                                                                                                                    Ashish Gupta                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:34 PM GMT+5:30

Can we please have this checked ? 

                      
          
              

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap
Manager: Anmol Sawhney 
Manager's email: anmol.sawhney@clevertap.com

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap
Manager: Anmol Sawhney 
Manager's email: anmol.sawhney@clevertap.com

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

Best Regards,

            Gallabox Support 
  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap
Manager: Anmol Sawhney

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap
Manager: Anmol Sawhney 
Manager's email: anmol.sawhney@clevertap.com

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

            Gallabox Support 
  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap

**From:** Vimal Ganesh  
**Time:** 2025-09-08T11:30:44.915Z

Hi Team,

Thank you for your patience. We have re-validated this with our backend team, and they have confirmed that the report you shared is correct and there is no error in it.

To clarify with an example:

Sent: 1000

Delivered: 950

Error: 25

The calculation works as 950 (Delivered) + 25 (Error) = 975, and the remaining 25 messages stay in the “Sent” state (indicated as a single tick on WhatsApp). These are messages that have been successfully handed over to WhatsApp but are yet to be delivered to the recipient’s device.

This is the expected behavior of WhatsApp message states, which is why the numbers may appear slightly mismatched at first glance.

We completely understand your concern, and that’s why we ensured to reconfirm this with our backend team before responding. Please be assured there is no issue with the reporting.

We truly value your patience and cooperation, and we’re here to support you if you face any further challenges.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

            Gallabox Support 
  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap

On Mon, 8 Sept 2025 at 17:01, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

Thank you for your patience. We have re-validated this with our backend team, and they have confirmed that the report you shared is correct and there is no error in it.

To clarify with an example:

Sent: 1000

Delivered: 950

Error: 25

The calculation works as 950 (Delivered) + 25 (Error) = 975, and the remaining 25 messages stay in the “Sent” state (indicated as a single tick on WhatsApp). These are messages that have been successfully handed over to WhatsApp but are yet to be delivered to the recipient’s device.

This is the expected behavior of WhatsApp message states, which is why the numbers may appear slightly mismatched at first glance.

We completely understand your concern, and that’s why we ensured to reconfirm this with our backend team before responding. Please be assured there is no issue with the reporting.

We truly value your patience and cooperation, and we’re here to support you if you face any further challenges.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap
Manager: Anmol Sawhney 
Manager's email: anmol.sawhney@clevertap.com

On Mon, 8 Sept 2025 at 17:01, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

Thank you for your patience. We have re-validated this with our backend team, and they have confirmed that the report you shared is correct and there is no error in it.

To clarify with an example:

Sent: 1000

Delivered: 950

Error: 25

The calculation works as 950 (Delivered) + 25 (Error) = 975, and the remaining 25 messages stay in the “Sent” state (indicated as a single tick on WhatsApp). These are messages that have been successfully handed over to WhatsApp but are yet to be delivered to the recipient’s device.

This is the expected behavior of WhatsApp message states, which is why the numbers may appear slightly mismatched at first glance.

We completely understand your concern, and that’s why we ensured to reconfirm this with our backend team before responding. Please be assured there is no issue with the reporting.

We truly value your patience and cooperation, and we’re here to support you if you face any further challenges.

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap
Manager: Anmol Sawhney

On Mon, 8 Sept 2025 at 17:01, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

Thank you for your patience. We have re-validated this with our backend team, and they have confirmed that the report you shared is correct and there is no error in it.

To clarify with an example:

Sent: 1000

Delivered: 950

Error: 25

The calculation works as 950 (Delivered) + 25 (Error) = 975, and the remaining 25 messages stay in the “Sent” state (indicated as a single tick on WhatsApp). These are messages that have been successfully handed over to WhatsApp but are yet to be delivered to the recipient’s device.

This is the expected behavior of WhatsApp message states, which is why the numbers may appear slightly mismatched at first glance.

We completely understand your concern, and that’s why we ensured to reconfirm this with our backend team before responding. Please be assured there is no issue with the reporting.

We truly value your patience and cooperation, and we’re here to support you if you face any further challenges.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

            Gallabox Support 
  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

                          Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap

On Mon, 8 Sept 2025 at 17:01, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

Thank you for your patience. We have re-validated this with our backend team, and they have confirmed that the report you shared is correct and there is no error in it.

To clarify with an example:

Sent: 1000

Delivered: 950

Error: 25

The calculation works as 950 (Delivered) + 25 (Error) = 975, and the remaining 25 messages stay in the “Sent” state (indicated as a single tick on WhatsApp). These are messages that have been successfully handed over to WhatsApp but are yet to be delivered to the recipient’s device.

This is the expected behavior of WhatsApp message states, which is why the numbers may appear slightly mismatched at first glance.

We completely understand your concern, and that’s why we ensured to reconfirm this with our backend team before responding. Please be assured there is no issue with the reporting.

We truly value your patience and cooperation, and we’re here to support you if you face any further challenges.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

                                                                                                                                    Ashish Gupta                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:34 PM GMT+5:30

Can we please have this checked ? 

                      
          
              

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap
Manager: Anmol Sawhney

On Mon, 8 Sept 2025 at 17:01, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

Thank you for your patience. We have re-validated this with our backend team, and they have confirmed that the report you shared is correct and there is no error in it.

To clarify with an example:

Sent: 1000

Delivered: 950

Error: 25

The calculation works as 950 (Delivered) + 25 (Error) = 975, and the remaining 25 messages stay in the “Sent” state (indicated as a single tick on WhatsApp). These are messages that have been successfully handed over to WhatsApp but are yet to be delivered to the recipient’s device.

This is the expected behavior of WhatsApp message states, which is why the numbers may appear slightly mismatched at first glance.

We completely understand your concern, and that’s why we ensured to reconfirm this with our backend team before responding. Please be assured there is no issue with the reporting.

We truly value your patience and cooperation, and we’re here to support you if you face any further challenges.

Best Regards,

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap

On Mon, 8 Sept 2025 at 17:01, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

Thank you for your patience. We have re-validated this with our backend team, and they have confirmed that the report you shared is correct and there is no error in it.

To clarify with an example:

Sent: 1000

Delivered: 950

Error: 25

The calculation works as 950 (Delivered) + 25 (Error) = 975, and the remaining 25 messages stay in the “Sent” state (indicated as a single tick on WhatsApp). These are messages that have been successfully handed over to WhatsApp but are yet to be delivered to the recipient’s device.

This is the expected behavior of WhatsApp message states, which is why the numbers may appear slightly mismatched at first glance.

We completely understand your concern, and that’s why we ensured to reconfirm this with our backend team before responding. Please be assured there is no issue with the reporting.

We truly value your patience and cooperation, and we’re here to support you if you face any further challenges.

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap

On Mon, 8 Sept 2025 at 17:01, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

Thank you for your patience. We have re-validated this with our backend team, and they have confirmed that the report you shared is correct and there is no error in it.

To clarify with an example:

Sent: 1000

Delivered: 950

Error: 25

The calculation works as 950 (Delivered) + 25 (Error) = 975, and the remaining 25 messages stay in the “Sent” state (indicated as a single tick on WhatsApp). These are messages that have been successfully handed over to WhatsApp but are yet to be delivered to the recipient’s device.

This is the expected behavior of WhatsApp message states, which is why the numbers may appear slightly mismatched at first glance.

We completely understand your concern, and that’s why we ensured to reconfirm this with our backend team before responding. Please be assured there is no issue with the reporting.

We truly value your patience and cooperation, and we’re here to support you if you face any further challenges.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

Additionally, the Clevertap report issue has been fixed.

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

            Gallabox Support 
  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

                                    Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap
Manager: Anmol Sawhney

On Mon, 8 Sept 2025 at 17:01, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

Thank you for your patience. We have re-validated this with our backend team, and they have confirmed that the report you shared is correct and there is no error in it.

To clarify with an example:

Sent: 1000

Delivered: 950

Error: 25

The calculation works as 950 (Delivered) + 25 (Error) = 975, and the remaining 25 messages stay in the “Sent” state (indicated as a single tick on WhatsApp). These are messages that have been successfully handed over to WhatsApp but are yet to be delivered to the recipient’s device.

This is the expected behavior of WhatsApp message states, which is why the numbers may appear slightly mismatched at first glance.

We completely understand your concern, and that’s why we ensured to reconfirm this with our backend team before responding. Please be assured there is no issue with the reporting.

We truly value your patience and cooperation, and we’re here to support you if you face any further challenges.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

            Gallabox Support 
  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap

On Mon, 8 Sept 2025 at 17:01, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

Thank you for your patience. We have re-validated this with our backend team, and they have confirmed that the report you shared is correct and there is no error in it.

To clarify with an example:

Sent: 1000

Delivered: 950

Error: 25

The calculation works as 950 (Delivered) + 25 (Error) = 975, and the remaining 25 messages stay in the “Sent” state (indicated as a single tick on WhatsApp). These are messages that have been successfully handed over to WhatsApp but are yet to be delivered to the recipient’s device.

This is the expected behavior of WhatsApp message states, which is why the numbers may appear slightly mismatched at first glance.

We completely understand your concern, and that’s why we ensured to reconfirm this with our backend team before responding. Please be assured there is no issue with the reporting.

We truly value your patience and cooperation, and we’re here to support you if you face any further challenges.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

                                    Namaste @IT TYI
Can we please have this checked ? 

                      
          
              

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap
Manager: Anmol Sawhney 
Manager's email: anmol.sawhney@clevertap.com

On Mon, 8 Sept 2025 at 17:01, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

Thank you for your patience. We have re-validated this with our backend team, and they have confirmed that the report you shared is correct and there is no error in it.

To clarify with an example:

Sent: 1000

Delivered: 950

Error: 25

The calculation works as 950 (Delivered) + 25 (Error) = 975, and the remaining 25 messages stay in the “Sent” state (indicated as a single tick on WhatsApp). These are messages that have been successfully handed over to WhatsApp but are yet to be delivered to the recipient’s device.

This is the expected behavior of WhatsApp message states, which is why the numbers may appear slightly mismatched at first glance.

We completely understand your concern, and that’s why we ensured to reconfirm this with our backend team before responding. Please be assured there is no issue with the reporting.

We truly value your patience and cooperation, and we’re here to support you if you face any further challenges.

Best Regards,
Vimal G,
Technical Solutions Specialist.

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

Best Regards,

  Apr 22, 2025, 1:22 PM GMT+5:30 
 Hi Team,

Our backend team has thoroughly investigated the issue you raised regarding the "View Data Not Displaying Correctly."

As of now, the system accurately provides data for the "Sent," "Delivered," and "Viewed" statuses, and all functionalities are operating as expected.

Please note that if an end user has disabled read receipts in their WhatsApp settings, the corresponding message will not be reflected in the "Viewed" column. This behavior is aligned with WhatsApp’s privacy settings.

Apart from this scenario, everything appears to be functioning correctly on our end.

Should you have any further questions or require additional clarification, please feel free to reach out.

                                                                                                                                                      Shreya Khale (CleverTap)                                          
                          Apr 9, 2025, 1:25 PM GMT+5:30            
                                    Hi team,
 
We have checked your campaign - and can see that the campaign was sent successfully from CleverTap's end and was also delivered by the provider.
 

 
However, we can see an error alert on this campaign - "Campaign sent, but the view count is pending. Check Status Callback configuration with the provider."
This shows that the viewed count hasn't been sent to us by the provider yet. Request you to kindly reach out to your provider for the same.
 
These are the number of messages viewed from the user's device. WhatsApp's blue tick indicates that the message has been viewed. The provider informs CleverTap when a message is viewed via callback URLs, and then CleverTap marks these messages as Viewed. CleverTap displays the Viewed count on the basis of viewed callbacks in the campaign stats.
 
The following causes can impact the viewed stats:
Message status callback is not configured correctly.
Incorrect format for the callback from the provider.
The user has turned off read receipts.
 
Kindly refer to the following doc-
https://docs.clevertap.com/docs/generic-whatsapp#message-status-callbacks
Best regards,
Shreya Khale

Customer Success Engineer | CleverTap
Manager: Anmol Sawhney 
Manager's email: anmol.sawhney@clevertap.com

On Mon, 8 Sept 2025 at 17:01, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

Thank you for your patience. We have re-validated this with our backend team, and they have confirmed that the report you shared is correct and there is no error in it.

To clarify with an example:

Sent: 1000

Delivered: 950

Error: 25

The calculation works as 950 (Delivered) + 25 (Error) = 975, and the 
remaining 25 messages stay in the “Sent” state (indicated as a single tick on WhatsApp). These are messages that have been successfully handed over to WhatsApp but are yet to be delivered to the recipient’s device.

This is the expected behavior of WhatsApp message states, which is why the numbers may appear slightly mismatched at first glance.

We completely understand your concern, and that’s why we ensured to reconfirm this with our backend team before responding. Please be assured there is no issue with the reporting.

We truly value your patience and cooperation, and we’re here to support you if you face any further challenges.

Best Regards,

Vimal G,

Technical Solutions Specialist.

On Sat, 19 Jul 2025 at 11:19, Gallabox Support <support@gallabox.com> wrote:

Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

We tried reaching out to you, but since we didn’t receive a response, we connected with Lojo Paul from your team to discuss the issue.

As discussed, you mentioned that the report in CleverTap is showing a "Generic Miscellaneous Error." This type of error typically occurs due to one of the following reasons:

1) The recipient’s number is not registered on WhatsApp.

2) The recipient is using an outdated version of the WhatsApp application.

3) The recipient has not accepted WhatsApp’s latest Terms of Service.

I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference, which highlights the error. Due to this, the utility template is not being delivered to the customer.

Apologies for the delay in resolving this issue. Our backend team is actively working on it and has prioritized this task. We are committed to resolving it within next week (excluding Monday).

Please allow us this week to get this resolved. We truly appreciate your patience and support in the meantime.

Best Regards,
